name: Wagonwheel Layered Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. Spread bean dip on a pie plate.
2. Pour Pace Picante Sauce over the bean dip.
3. Sprinkle chopped onions over the mixture.
4. Blend together mayonnaise and sour cream in a separate bowl.
5. Spread the mayo-sour cream mixture over the onions.
6. Top with cheese and additional Pace Picante Sauce.
7. Sprinkle sliced olives over the cheese.
8. Makes 2-1/2 cups dip.
